text.title: MCP Security — Consent, Injection Defenses, Access Controls — Decision Tree

branch.conclusion: Apply r1 (consent) + r3 (output-as-data) + r6 (audit). Auth grade N/A.
Apply r1 + r2 (OAuth 2.1 PKCE) + r3 + r4 (capability attestation) + r6 + r7 (lookalike detection).
Apply all rules r1..r7. Strict per-tenant isolation; per-server credentials; signed manifests; audit on shared storage.

example.p: Support-agent with filesystem (local) + github (remote single tenant) + jira (remote multi-tenant) → highest scope rules → all r1..r7 apply.
